title: Manufacturing Engineer - Wavin India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Wavin India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Wavin India has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wavin India:
Wavin India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India!
